title: VB-GRAM G replaces MGNREGA from July 1 | Key details explained
description: The Central Government has announced VB-GRAM G, a new rural employment mission set to replace MGNREGA from July 1, 2026. The transition aims to be smooth, with job cards remaining valid and ongoing work continuing without disruption. Here’s everything you need to know about the new scheme and what it means for rural workers.
